title: Interpretation
doc_html:
§461.14.  Interpretation

Nothing in this Part shall be construed to abrogate or affect the provisions of any statute, ordinance or regulation which is more restrictive than the provisions of this Part.  

Added by Acts 1966, No. 474, §1.

§461.14.  Interpretation
Nothing in this Part shall be construed to abrogate or affect the provisions of any statute, ordinance or regulation which is more restrictive than the provisions of this Part.
Added by Acts 1966, No. 474, §1.
